capability_text: Python 3.12, pip, pytest 9.1.1, Node.js, npm, Bash/POSIX coreutils, Perl, and Git are installed. sqlite3, FastAPI, Pydantic, SQLAlchemy, SQLModel, and HTTPX are installed.
